title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More
org: Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More
shortInfo: JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification released for 6 posts. Eligible candidates can apply offline until 03 June 2026 through the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI).

basic_details.job_title: JMI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More
basic_details.short_information: JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026 notification released for 6 posts. Eligible candidates can apply offline until 03 June 2026 through the official website of Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI).

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degrees, Diplomas in Education, Senior Secondary Certificates.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the JMI Guest Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the JMI Guest Teacher recruitment is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Guest Teacher posts at JMI?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Guest Teacher posts at Jamia Millia Islamia. These vacancies are distributed across various teaching roles including Adult Education, Primary, Nursery, and Craft.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Guest Primary Teacher post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Guest Primary Teacher post is a Senior Secondary School Certificate with 50% marks or Intermediate with 50% marks or its equivalent, along with a pass in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET).

faq.question: Are there any specific eligibility criteria for women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Guest Adult Education Teacher, Guest Primary Teacher, and Guest Nursery Teacher posts, only women candidates are eligible to apply.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or by hand to the specified address.

faq.question: Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to the office of the offg. Head Mistress, Balak Mata Centre, Matia Mahal, Delhi-110006.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: What is the experience required for the Guest Adult Education Teacher post?
faq.answer: For the Guest Adult Education Teacher post, two years of experience of working with children and mothers in any recognized Institution or NGO of repute is required.

faq.question: Can applications be submitted via email?
faq.answer: No, applications submitted through email will not be entertained. Candidates must submit their applications offline as per the instructions.

faq.question: What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is J.11/BMC/JMI/2026.

seo_tags: Jamia Millia Islamia Guest Adult Education Teacher
